settings.title: My Account
settings.subtitle: Manage your nickname, password, and language.
settings.languageSubtitle: Choose the language Date Navi should use.
settings.passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
settings.deleteWarning: Deleting your account will permanently remove your profile, preferences, and message history. Shared date cards and reactions will remain visible to your partner.
settings.deleteError: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
settings.relationshipDateSaveError: Could not save your relationship start date. Please try again.
settings.notificationOffBody: You can turn notifications on later in Settings.
settings.notificationEnabledBody: Notifications are on. Open Settings to turn them off.
settings.notificationDisabledBody: Notifications are off. Open Settings to turn them on.
settings.locationOnBody: You can now get date place suggestions using your location.
settings.locationOffBody: You can turn location permission on later in Settings.
settings.locationEnabledBody: Location permission is on. Open Settings to turn it off.
settings.locationDisabledBody: Location permission is off. Open Settings to turn it on.
